capacity_evidence.target: four Blackhole P300c devices in a fixed 1x4 ring mesh
capacity_evidence.attention_partition: 16 of 64 Q heads and 2 of 8 KV heads per device; local SDPA; row-parallel O with one ring all-reduce
capacity_evidence.expert_partition: eight complete experts per device; global gate-selected top-4 only; three sparse matmuls with runtime-inferred rank-local nnz; 9x10/subblock-1 prefill programs; sparse outputs immediately BF16; local weighted sum returned to BFP8 for one ring all-reduce
capacity_evidence.rejected_expert_alternative: TP4 all-expert fracture is implemented with logical intermediate 720 padded to physical 736 per device, but EP4 is faster in both full-layer prefill and traced decode
capacity_evidence.collective_topology: FABRIC_1D_RING / Ring / cluster axis 1 / one link; production uses two ring all-reduces per layer
capacity_evidence.rejected_decode_collective: persistent-semaphore minimal-async reduce-scatter plus async all-gather with 2880-to-2944 padding is correct and trace-safe but 6.7% slower at 500 replays; fused matmul plus minimal RS is disabled on Blackhole for GPT-OSS race #46181
capacity_evidence.validation: RUN_MULTICHIP_CONTEXT=1 test_full_context_cache_allocation_and_last_page_update allocates both paged two-local-KV-head caches per rank and executes a synchronized selected-default EP4 decode update at position 131071 through a reversed page table
capacity_evidence.prior_limit_status: superseded: TP4 KV-head partitioning and EP4 weight partitioning fit the full HF-advertised cache contract with explicit reserve

notes: The fixed 1x4 P300 path restores and retains the HF-advertised 131072-token cache contract. Capacity evidence validates physical paged-cache allocation and the final logical position, not a single 131072-token prefill invocation. Public logical sequence lengths remain unaligned: internal tile/page padding and 128-token active-expert chunking are not exposed. Exact prefill executes four token-specific expert routes; per-rank EP ownership means the local active count is data dependent from zero through four. Full Ethernet watcher is physically unavailable because instrumentation grows ACTIVE_ETH to 27920 bytes versus the 25600-byte kernel-config buffer; the worker/Tensix watcher passes both layer kinds after reset and mesh reopen.

prefill.capacity_status: paged-cache capacity validated at 131072; full-length prefill compute was not run
prefill.cache_behavior: fills two-local-KV-head paged key/value caches through an arbitrary page-table mapping and returns the exact logical sequence length
prefill.expert_behavior: pads internally to 32, chunks at 128, uses 9x10/subblock-1 gate/up and down programs, executes exactly four token-specific global active experts through three sparse matmuls, converts sparse results immediately to BF16, ring-reduces BFP8 EP4 local weighted sums, and slices back to logical S
prefill.input_output_layout: replicated BF16 [1,1,S,2880] suitable for direct decoder stacking

decode.cache_behavior: updates the rank-local physical page selected by the replicated page table; eager and traced reverse-page-table physical cache pages are bit-identical on all four ranks
decode.decode_layout: 10-core [32,288] QKV input shards, 20-core [32,64] QKV output shards, 10-core input/post-attention RMSNorms, replicated [1,1,1,2880] output; production ring all-reduce selected over a correct persistent RS+AG candidate
decode.trace_behavior: warmed capture/replay with mutable position tensor; five replay determinism coverage; both sliding and full attention; page-table contents are capture-static, so a validated future-block allocation update releases, warms, and recaptures before replay (PCC 1.0 at position 192)
